overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a stormy mountain trail at night. The character traverses a dirt path through a foggy valley, passes ancient stone ruins, and reaches a cliffside overlook with a view of a lake below. Dark storm clouds dominate the sky with occasional bright moonlight breaking through.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the stormy valley, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
dark storm-covered mountain peaks in the distance
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the valley
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the valley
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through a stormy mountain valley at night. The path winds through grassy terrain with pine forests on either side, while dark storm clouds obscure the mountain peaks ahead. The atmosphere is foggy and ominous with low visibility.

events.description: ancient stone arch bridge comes into view on the right side of the path
passing the stone structure, wooden fence appears along the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, approaching and passing the weathered stone ruins

entered.detail: weathered stone archway or small bridge over the path
rustic wooden fence posts along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail approaches an ancient stone arch bridge on the right. Geralt passes the weathered stone structure as a wooden fence comes into view along the right side of the path. The mountains shift to the left as the trail curves, with the storm continuing to rage overhead.

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive lake view on the left side
bright moonlight breaks through storm clouds illuminating the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path, observing the dramatic stormy lake view

entered.detail: dark water visible below the cliffside path
rocky cliff edge dropping down to the water

segments.scene_description: The trail curves along a cliffside revealing a vast lake below. The wooden fence ends as the path continues along the rocky edge. Storm clouds part to show bright moonlight reflecting off the water, with distant mountains visible across the lake, creating a dramatic and atmospheric vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy mountain trail that transforms from a claustrophobic, foggy valley into a sweeping cliffside vista. It begins with Geralt navigating a winding dirt path through grassy terrain and dense pine forests under an ominous, cloud-covered sky. As the trail curves, the camera passes a weathered ancient stone arch bridge and a rustic wooden fence while the surrounding mountains shift in perspective. The scene then opens up as the path reaches a rocky cliff edge, where the wooden fence ends and the terrain drops away to reveal a vast lake below. Finally, the storm clouds part to allow bright moonlight to reflect off the water, illuminating distant mountains in a dramatic atmospheric shift.
